author: Edward C.
pros: Ease of use, drops in any form of document whether that be pdf or word
cons: Doesn't always pull info through when it isn't in order

description: The customer service is excellent and is very quick to help and do what they can. I have been very pleased with all that I have worked with.
author: Nanette D.
pros: It formats the resumes and gives me a head start that saves me time as I format the resumes for all recruiters
cons: There are little things that you still need to tweak and sometimes I think the resume is pulled from somewhere other than what we have in BH b/c I have to totally redo the resume with correct information. We have worked on spacing several times and I still have to do a lot of spacing corrections. But overall it saves me a lot of time as it puts it in and I just have to tweak it.

author: Tom W.
pros: Quick, Easy and Efficient while being east to use.
cons: Sometimes ruins the formatting when downloading the CV and misses important information

description: Overall, we have enjoyed the product minus the inital kinks we needed to work out. Several of out recruiters rely on the tool heavily to get resumes formatted efficiently and effectively.
author: Kirsten O.
pros: We implemented Allsorter as a tool to cut back on multiple variations of resumes being submitted to our clients. It has also helped to cut back on time spent by each individual recruiter formatting resumes. Overall, we have found the recruiters on our teams, depend heavily on the the Allsorter tool. I would definitely recommend it to other firms.
cons: Initially we had some issues with the tool eliminating things we needed to be in our template or the format in which it was populating the formatted resume however we worked with the support team to iron out the kinks.

author: Adam M.
pros: Allsorter efficiently formats CV's into a uniform layout. It very rarely needs any tweaks to it and saves us loads of time.
cons: It could be slightly better at discerning between jobs where people have been with businesses for multiple years and held multiple job roles.

description: overall really great product. not sure of what the the cost is so cannot compare
author: elliot I.
pros: saves me SO much time editing cv's which makes my job easier
cons: since the last edit, sometimes allsorter tends to try and scroll itself up while I'm using it which is a bit of a pain

description: Working with Allsorter has been simply amazing, an absolute gamechanger in the recruitment industry for us. Experts always on hand to assist with training sessions and are always responsive to our demands.
author: Glenn S.
pros: The best thing about allsorter is simple; the speed and accuracy of converting CV's coupled with the ease of the software, even for entry level operators.
cons: The text boxes can sometimes be a little difficult to maneuver.

author: Courtney M.
pros: I love how customised our all sorted experience is! Our profile template has changed a couple times since we moved to AllSorter and each time has been such an easy experience. It's been so time saving and has changed the game for resume formatting. I could't imagine my job without it anymore.
cons: There are very few cons that spring to mind, I think the main con is that ocassionaly it removes location names when formatting a CV.

author: Shane C.
pros: Resume parsing is great as it enables us to format CVs quickly. It also means that formatted CVs are uniformed to company standard and means we are better able to promote the company when submitting CVs to clients.
cons: It would be nice if we could customise the template a bit ourselves but other than that there is nothing I dislike.

review_title: Finally! Someone developed a solution to resume formatting.
author: Noel W.
pros: Our team has been able to save countless hours that we used to spend getting resumes into our standard format. It used to take a recruiter/admin 15 minutes on average to get a rescue into our standard format but now it's less than 5 minutes.
cons: It is not "perfect"...once the resume is re-formatted, you still need to finish it off before sending on to a client. It gets it 95% of the way there though.

author: Paulina L.
pros: It is quite intuitive software, very easy to use, dashboard isn't overly complicated, comes with great support, team is very attentive. I had really badly formatted CV's still accepted by software for re-formatting.
cons: The only one that bothers me is that I cannot amend telephone number that comes up on the CV, there isn't an option on user profile to do that. I have to do it manually each time.

author: Thomas P.
pros: Integrates well with our ATS, can quickly prepare formatted and informative CV's!
cons: No real negatives to using this software.

description: Very pleased, both [sensitive content hidden] keep in touch and are very responsive. Currently taking 2 licences on a paid trial, before rolling out across the business.
author: Gavin S.
pros: The speed and functionality of the software
cons: No real cons at present, we are tweaking daily until we are happy with the template and use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic time saving with great customer service
description: [sensitive content hidden] has been amazing, she's always there to help making small tweaks for us. The software has been a god send!
author: Greg K.
pros: This has saved me an incredible amount of time formatting CVs
cons: Nothing at all - I like the software very much
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alex M.
pros: Clever, easy and saves me time! And quick customer care
cons: Nothing that springs to mind! Will share in future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jay T.
pros: The ease of use and standardisation of CV's
cons: Very occasional issues with formatting, but this is due to original CV formatting rather than Allsorter.

author: Alberto L.
pros: Can transform PDF into word, with ok results
cons: Skills reported are random names sometimes

author: Harvey L.
pros: it is easy to move CVs on to the software
cons: sometimes parsing CVS through here remove all the important information and i spend esxtensive time retyping it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall Allsorter has improved the quality of CVs issued to hiring managers. The length of time to prepare a CV has significantly reduced so the tool is effective in our business
author: Wayne K.
pros: Allsorter is easy to use, take the pain out of manually preparing a CV to issue to hiring managers and clients. Ongoing updates make the product more easy to use and it's functionality is evolving constantly. [sensitive content hidden] and the team behind the scenes on the development end are always on hand to help with any issues
cons: *Increasingly CVs are designed by candidates with page breaks, saved in certain formats that are not adaptable through Allsorter. This can take time to get the issues resolved which is against the purpose of the efficiency of using it in the first place. *Sometimes random letters might be missing on CV's or certain words highlighted in Italics.* When spacing text on the CV, large gaps are left in pages which are difficult to format.

description: Aside from the product itself, the implementation team and account managers have been knowledgeable, professional and effective.
author: Richard D.
pros: We searched for years to find a product that enables us to format CVs in a particular way and is appropriate to our business. Allsorter fulfills the brief in terms of functionality, ease of use and price. It has saved a huge amount of time in preparing CV shortlists and is one of the best tech products we have incorporated recently. Great product.
cons: That we didn't know about it years ago!

review_title: Allsorter.com has transformed the way we manage our resume send out files
description: I have been using allsorter.com for several months now, and I have been extremely impressed with the platform's ease of use and powerful features. The ability to automatically sort and categorize my files based on their content has been a game-changer for my productivity, and the data analysis tools have helped me make more informed decisions in my business. Overall, allsorter.com has become an essential tool in my digital workflow, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking to manage their digital files and data more efficiently.
author: James H.
pros: Overall, allsorter.com is a comprehensive platform that provides a range of useful features to help users manage their digital files and data more efficiently. The platform is easy to use, affordable, and offers a range of powerful tools that can help users make more informed decisions in their business.
cons: Overall, while there are some potential limitations to allsorter.com, the platform still provides a range of useful features and tools for managing digital files and data, and may be a good option for many users depending on their specific needs and priorities.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use, saves loads of time
description: Saving time and increasing accuracy Customer service/training is very good
author: Josie H.
pros: Definitely saves time with preparing CVs and makes sure they are always consistent to all clients Branding makes it look really professional Easy to navigate the website
cons: Some areas of the CV aren't always carried across correctly - for example the Skills section is automatically populated but if they had a skills section in their CV I think this should carry across

description: My overall experience has been positive. I have really appreciated having a single point of contact to assist with my Allsorter needs, which doesnt involve me having to fill out a generic "contact us" form. Allsorter feels like they care about my needs personally, since our point of contact is responsive and changes our templates as needed. The system is pretty quick to learn and works well for all resume formats.
author: Grace M.
pros: Allsorter has made the task of editing resumes simplified by providing shortcuts that save me significant time. I appreciate that it can format any type of resume with few errors.
cons: One thing I don't like about Allsorter is that it takes any skill it reads in the resume and adds it to the technical skills section in 1 paragraph. Since most technical candidates have their own organized chart of skills, that is what I prefer to bring over into the edited version. Allsorter isnt capable of reading this chart and bringing it over as it is.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best automated resume formatting system ever created
description: Excellent service from [sensitive content hidden] , our Client relationship manager, he helped me customize the system to exactly what I wanted and more! He is efficient and friendly and very good at what he does.
author: Natalie N.
pros: Th ease and efficiency of the system, it is also very user frindly and excellent to use and download from
cons: Nothing difficult and nothing missing from the system, it is the most superior system for formatting a resume
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Wallace C.
pros: It copy and pastes most of what is written in the CV
cons: It does not format well even if the information is specifically stated on the CV already. Its also places the information all over the place. It is easier to do it myself rather than to use Allsorter
author_profession: Head of Sourcing, Supply Chain & Manufacturing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
